Container.Name: Jumpcoin-Qt
Container.Overview: Unofficial community-maintained Docker container for the Jumpcoin Qt wallet. Runs the wallet in a headless X server and exposes the GUI through noVNC in any modern browser - no display server or VNC client required.
Container.Description: USE AT YOUR OWN RISK. This is an unofficial, community-maintained container, not affiliated with the original Jumpcoin developers or the Jumperbillijumper YouTube channel.[br][br] The image runs jumpcoin-qt under a virtual framebuffer (Xvfb) with Openbox, exposes it through TigerVNC and a noVNC web bridge, and also runs the embedded full node (RPC available on port 31240). A desktop shortcut inside the VNC session lets you re-launch the wallet if it ever crashes.[br][br] Data (blockchain, wallet, config) is persisted under the Appdata Path you configure below. See the README for offline-backup instructions - the wallet.dat is the only authoritative copy of your coins.[br][br] [b]Image variants:[/b][br] - :latest - standard, no Tor.[br] - :tor - bundles a Tor daemon and routes traffic through it automatically (clearnet+onion). Override via Extra Daemon Args: -onlynet=onion (onion only) or -noonion (disable Tor).
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: jumpcoin jump coin wallet crypto staking pos qt
Container.Requires: Docker with /dev/shm support. Image builds are pushed to ghcr.io on every v* tag.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: noVNC web UI - open http://[IP]:6080/vnc.html in a browser.

Config.Name: VNC Port
Config.Description: Raw VNC port for TigerVNC / Remmina clients.

Config.Name: RPC Port
Config.Description: JSON-RPC port. Only expose if you need external RPC access.

Config.Name: Appdata Path
Config.Description: Persistent blockchain, wallet, and config. The wallet.dat inside this directory is the only authoritative copy of your coins - back it up regularly.

Config.Name: VNC Password
Config.Description: Password for the noVNC web UI and VNC client. If empty, anyone on the network can connect - set this if the port is reachable by others.

Config.Name: RPC Password
Config.Description: Password for JSON-RPC. Required if you expose the RPC port externally.

Config.Name: RPC Allow IP
Config.Description: CIDR range allowed to call the JSON-RPC. Default restricts to localhost. Widen only if you need external RPC access.

Config.Name: Extra Daemon Args
Config.Description: Extra jumpcoin-qt arguments. The :tor image automatically routes traffic via Tor (clearnet+onion) - no config needed. Override: -onlynet=onion (onion only), -noonion (disable Tor).
